Package neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion

Class LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion.LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm extends Object implements Serializable
Langmuir adsorption isotherm for film-forming corrosion inhibitors.

The fractional surface coverage by inhibitor molecules is 

 theta = (K_ads * C) / (1 + K_ads * C)
where C is the inhibitor concentration in the bulk aqueous phase (mol/L) and K_ads is the adsorption equilibrium constant. The temperature dependence of K_ads follows the van 't Hoff equation 
 K_ads(T) = K_ads_ref * exp(-dHads / R * (1 / T - 1 / T_ref))
with adsorption enthalpy dHads typically in the range -20 to -60 kJ/mol for physisorption of imidazoline / quaternary-ammonium inhibitors on carbon steel (Bentiss et al., 2002; Khaled, 2008).

The inhibition efficiency is taken proportional to coverage: eta = theta_max * theta where theta_max caps the maximum achievable efficiency (typical 0.90 - 0.99 for high-performing imidazoline blends).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm

      public LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm()
      Default constructor with imidazoline-typical parameters.

    • LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm

      public LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm(double kAdsRef, double dHadsKjMol, double thetaMax, double molarMass)
      Constructs an isotherm with custom adsorption parameters.
      Parameters:
      kAdsRef - reference adsorption constant at 298.15 K [L/mol]
      dHadsKjMol - adsorption enthalpy [kJ/mol] (negative for exothermic)
      thetaMax - maximum coverage cap (0..1)
      molarMass - inhibitor molar mass [g/mol]

  • Method Details

    • getKAds

      public double getKAds(double temperatureC)
      Returns the temperature-corrected adsorption constant K_ads.
      Parameters:
      temperatureC - operating temperature [C]
      Returns:
      K_ads [L/mol]

    • getCoverage

      public double getCoverage(double doseMgL, double temperatureC)
      Computes fractional surface coverage at the given inhibitor dose.
      Parameters:
      doseMgL - inhibitor concentration [mg/L]
      temperatureC - operating temperature [C]
      Returns:
      coverage theta in [0,1]

    • getEfficiency

      public double getEfficiency(double doseMgL, double temperatureC)
      Computes inhibition efficiency (fraction of base corrosion rate suppressed).
      Parameters:
      doseMgL - inhibitor concentration [mg/L]
      temperatureC - operating temperature [C]
      Returns:
      efficiency in [0, thetaMax]

    • getDoseForEfficiency

      public double getDoseForEfficiency(double targetEfficiency, double temperatureC)
      Solves for the dose that gives a target efficiency.
      Parameters:
      targetEfficiency - target efficiency (0..thetaMax)
      temperatureC - operating temperature [C]
      Returns:
      required dose [mg/L]; returns positive infinity if target exceeds thetaMax

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Returns a structured map representation suitable for JSON serialisation.
      Returns:
      ordered map

      public String toJson()
      Returns a JSON representation.
      Returns:
